violations.text: The floors in back storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The (walls) in the (back storage) area is in poor repair. Observed a small hole The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (on top of food product in back storage) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
